sections.paragraph:
Original: צמח

Transliteration: tsemach

Phonetic: tseh'-makh

BDB Definition:

  1. sprout, growth, branch
    1. sprouting, growth, sprout
    2. growth (of process)
    3. sprout, shoot (of Messiah from Davidic tree)

Origin: from H6779

TWOT entry: 1928a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
